statement_html:
On considère l'équation \(random((random(-1,1)\cdot 4x+((random(-1,1)\cdot 4random(-1,1)\cdot 9-random(-1,1)\cdot 8)/random(-1,1)\cdot 1))/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1x+random(-1,1)\cdot 9),random(-1,1)\cdot 4+(random(-1,1)\cdot 8/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1x+random(-1,1)\cdot 9)))=0\).
Indiquez dans la liste ci-dessous, la valeur interdite de l'équation.
  \(wims(append item -(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 1) to wims(append item (-(random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1))+((random(-1,1)\cdot 3)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)); to ))[6]\)         \(wims(append item -(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 1) to wims(append item (-(random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1))+((random(-1,1)\cdot 3)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)); to ))[]\)  
  \(wims(append item -(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 1) to wims(append item (-(random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1))+((random(-1,1)\cdot 3)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)); to ))[]\)         \(wims(append item -(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 1) to wims(append item (-(random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1))+((random(-1,1)\cdot 3)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)); to ))[]\)  
  \(wims(append item -(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 1) to wims(append item (-(random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1))+((random(-1,1)\cdot 3)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)); to ))[]\)         \(wims(append item -(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)\cdot (random(-1,1)\cdot 1) to wims(append item (-(random(-1,1)\cdot 9)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 1))+((random(-1,1)\cdot 3)/(random(-1,1)\cdot 2)); to ))[]\)
